hero_subtitle: SFTY supports VASPs by linking alerts, evidence and decisions into a structured EDD case workflow that preserves audit-ready notes and escalation trails.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Edd case workflows depend on manual steps
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with disconnected notes, scattered evidence and inconsistent case escalation processes. This fragmentation slows enhanced due diligence, weakens audit readiness and complicates defensible regulatory review for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes case notes, evidence, provider outputs and escalation actions into a consistent workflow that streamlines enhanced due diligence and strengthens audit-ready documentation for VASPs.
workflow_title: From alerts to enhanced due diligence cases
workflow_description: SFTY structures alerts from multiple providers into EDD case workflows with evidence collection, review notes, escalation and audit-ready documentation for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects enhanced due diligence provider results into structured cases, decisions, evidence and audit-ready workflows that compliance teams can trust and efficiently manage.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled workflows, preserved evidence and secure deployment to meet high standards of EDD case management and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enhanced due diligence case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how EDD case notes link to audit evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs integrate into EDD case management

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows for digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage enhanced due diligence cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures EDD case workflows by linking alerts, provider checks, reviewer notes, decision logs and escalation paths to support consistent and auditable due diligence processing.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision records, reviewer notes and supporting evidence to help compliance teams maintain audit-ready documentation for regulatory and internal review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with current compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing AML, KYC, KYT and Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into a connected compliance workflow without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing AML or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, cases and reports to improve operational efficiency and audit readiness.
final_title: Structure enhanced due diligence cases with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, evidence and decision logs into controlled EDD cases for audit-ready compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
